commit_scope: Promote live Android/Mac witness counters into a Form-native witness-state receipt row.

commands: coord join && coord claim "form native witness state exporter"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/co-learning.fk form-stdlib/co-learning-stream.fk form-stdlib/champion-challenger.fk form-stdlib/colearning-retire.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/llm-feature-channel-floor.fk form-stdlib/android-mesh-learning.fk form-stdlib/witness-state-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/witness-state-receipt-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused validation returned 4095 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`. The manifest gate returned `PASS-4WAY witness-state-receipt`. The receipt row encodes the previously observed live witness counters with integer-scaled summary metrics: frames 141, mic_rms_ppm 7045, camera_luma_ppm 28054, camera_samples 2367, gpu_samples 99, gpu_latency_us 1412, and sample_count 5084. No Python receipt helper was extended; Python use in this slice is limited to repository evidence validation.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI had not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this Form recipe slice.

phase_gate.gate: Live Android/Mac witness counters must be represented as native Form rows before heldout speech, vision, multimodal, and GPU learners consume them as samples.
phase_gate.next: Wire the running Mac witness to emit native receipt cells continuously, then join the summary rows to heldout speech, vision, multimodal, and accelerator learners.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The live witness-state proof is no longer only a docs/JQ observation. A Form recipe can validate the summary-only live counters, lower them into android-mesh-learning active sample rows, route speech, vision, and multimodal lanes native-first, and still refuse to retire an oracle without enough heldout samples.
test_flows: A live state row must be present and have frames.
Mic, camera, and GPU counters require matching active organs and nonzero summaries.
Privacy must be summary-only and reject raw-media storage.
The Form-native exporter source is accepted while the Python helper is not the source of authority.
Speech, vision, and multimodal routes become native-first only after active media samples are present.
Heldout retirement remains false for too-few samples.
e2e_validation.summary: The established floor is a Form-native witness-state receipt row with four-way proof. The remaining gaps are continuous native witness export, heldout learner joins, and deeper Vulkan/NNAPI/Metal accelerator receipts.
